200# return «

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌝

Fighter type: Archer

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Robin Bad’s attacks additionally fires a chain lightning at a random enemy. The lightning bolt deals 100000 magic damage, reduces the target’s magic armor by 2% for 15 sec, and bounces 4 times. Stacks up to 10 times. Triggers only once per 1 sec.

description 4/6

Robin Bad’s attacks additionally fires a chain lightning at a random enemy. The lightning bolt deals 150000 magic damage, reduces the target’s magic armor by 3% for 15 sec, and bounces 4 times. Stacks up to 10 times. Triggers only once per 1 sec. Once in a while, Robin Bad applies lightning effects to all units on the battlefield for 7 sec. Allies and enemies are affected by different effects : All enemies are electrified for 7 seconds. Whenever an electrified enemy uses an ability, they are stunned for 1 sec. Also, that enemy takes 200000 magic damage and has a random buff removed from them. All allies gain lightning effect for 7 seconds. Whenever an ally uses an ability, they have a random debuff removed from them and restore 5% of their max health. This ally will also have increased damage, spell power, as well as physical and magic pierce by 10% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 4 times.

description 6/6

Robin Bad’s attacks additionally fires a chain lightning at a random enemy. The lightning bolt deals 250000 magic damage, reduces the target’s magic armor by 5% for 15 sec, and bounces 4 times. Stacks up to 10 times. Triggers only once per 1 sec. Once in a while, Robin Bad applies lightning effects to all units on the battlefield for 7 sec. Allies and enemies are affected by different effects : All enemies are electrified for 7 seconds. Whenever an electrified enemy uses an ability, they are stunned for 1 sec. Also, that enemy takes 500000 magic damage and has a random buff removed from them. All allies gain lightning effect for 7 seconds. Whenever an ally uses an ability, they have a random debuff removed from them and restore 10% of their max health. This ally will also have increased damage, spell power, as well as physical and magic pierce by 15% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 4 times. Once in a while, a storm begins that lasts for 7 sec. During this time, Robin Bad gains a shield that reduces the incoming magic damage by 95%, and all allies gain a shield that reduces the incoming magic damage by 50%. Also, while the storm lasts, every second, a powerful lightning bolt strikes a random enemy (preferred target: mage). The lightning bolt deals 300000 magic damage and an extra magic damage equal to 25% of the main target’s spell power to the target and all enemies within a small radius around it. All enemies struck by lightning are stunned for 0,5 sec.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

The damage from chain lightning pierce 80% of the target’s magic armor.

description 4/6

The damage from chain lightning pierce 80% of the target’s magic armor. Damage to all enemies electrified by the set ability is also increased by 25% for 7 sec.

description 6/6

The damage from chain lightning pierce 80% of the target’s magic armor. Damage to all enemies electrified by the set ability is also increased by 25% for 7 sec. After being struck by a powerful lightning, a random enemy has a 60% chance to be struck by chain lightning from the set ability. The chain lightning deals 250000 pure damage, reduces the target’s magic armor by 5% for 15 sec, and bounces 4 times.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

Instead of reducing magic armor, Robin Bad steals it.

description 4/6

Instead of reducing magic armor, Robin Bad steals it. Also, Robin Bad and all allies have their incoming and outgoing healing increased by 45% for 7 sec.

description 6/6

Instead of reducing magic armor, Robin Bad steals it. Also, Robin Bad and all allies have their incoming and outgoing healing increased by 45% for 7 sec. Each powerful lightning strike restores health to Robin Bad and all allies in a small radius around him equal to 50% of the damage dealt.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

On hit, the chain lightning also reduces targets’ physical armor by 2% for 10 sec. Stacks up to 15 times.

description 4/6

On hit, the chain lightning also reduces targets’ physical armor by 3% for 10 sec. Stacks up to 15 times. Also, if the enemy dies within 7 sec of being electrified, they can’t be resurrected for 10 sec.

description 6/6

On hit, the chain lightning also reduces targets’ physical armor by 5% for 10 sec. Stacks up to 15 times. Also, if the enemy dies within 7 sec of being electrified, they can’t be resurrected for 10 sec. Instead of stunning, Robin Bad’s powerful lightning strikes turn enemies to stone. They can’t move and take 35% more damage.
